<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover">
<title>TaskBloc</title>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/react/18.2.0/umd/react.production.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/react-dom/18.2.0/umd/react-dom.production.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/babel-standalone/7.23.2/babel.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://accounts.google.com/gsi/client" async defer></script>
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="icon.png">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="default">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="TaskBloc">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lora:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&family=Nunito:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
:root{
  --bg:#faf7f2;--bg2:#f4ede3;--surface:#fffcf8;--surface2:#f7f1e8;--surface3:#ede5d8;
  --border:#e0d4c3;--border2:#cfc0aa;
  --accent:#c45c2a;--accent-light:#f0e8df;--accent2:#7a9e7e;--accent2-light:#e8f0e9;
  --text:#3a2e24;--text2:#7a6a58;--text3:#b0a090;
  --gold:#c49a3c;--gold-light:#fdf3dc;--purple:#8b6fb5;
  --shadow:rgba(90,60,30,0.08);--shadow2:rgba(90,60,30,0.15);
  --safe-bottom:env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px);
}
html,body{height:100%;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;}
#root{height:100%;}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:10px;}
.app{display:flex;height:100dvh;overflow:hidden;}

/* SIDEBAR */
.sidebar{width:220px;min-width:220px;background:var(--surface);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:24px 14px 16px;gap:2px;box-shadow:2px 0 10px var(--shadow);overflow-y:auto;flex-shrink:0;}
.sidebar-logo{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:20px;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:4px;}
.sidebar-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:20px;}
.sidebar-section{font-weight:700;font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.3px;color:var(--text3);padding:12px 10px 5px;}
.s-day{padding:9px 10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;border:1.5px solid transparent;}
.s-day:hover{background:var(--surface2);}
.s-day.active{background:var(--surface2);border-color:var(--border);}
.s-day.today{border-color:var(--accent)!important;background:#fef4ee;}
.s-day-label{font-weight:700;font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text3);}
.s-day.today .s-day-label{color:var(--accent);}
.s-day-date{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-top:1px;}
.s-day-count{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px;}

/* MAIN */
.main{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:28px 24px 32px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;}

/* DAY BLOCK */
.day-block{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:22px;box-shadow:0 2px 14px var(--shadow);position:relative;}
.day-block::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--gold));border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;z-index:1;}
.block-header{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.block-title-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.block-title{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:22px;color:var(--text);}
.block-sub{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-weight:400;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:3px;font-style:italic;}

/* DONE BADGES */
.done-badges{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;position:relative;cursor:pointer;margin-top:2px;}
.done-badge{width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;color:#fff;font-weight:700;border:1.5px solid #fff;margin-left:-4px;transition:transform .15s;}
.done-badge:first-child{margin-left:0;}
.done-badges:hover .done-badge{transform:scale(1.15);}
.done-bubble{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 8px);left:0;background:var(--surface);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 12px;min-width:200px;max-width:280px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px var(--shadow2);z-index:50;animation:mIn .15s ease;}
.done-bubble-title{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;}
.done-bubble-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:12px;color:var(--text2);text-decoration:line-through;}
.done-bubble-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.done-bubble-check{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent2);flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:8px;color:#fff;}
.done-bubble-close{display:block;margin-top:8px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);text-align:center;cursor:pointer;font-style:italic;}
.done-bubble-close:hover{color:var(--accent);}

/* TASK LIST - scrollable */
.task-list-wrap{overflow-y:auto;max-height:calc(4 * 58px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;padding-right:2px;}
.task-list-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
.task-list-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border2);border-radius:10px;}

/* BUTTONS */
.btn{padding:7px 15px;border-radius:20px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);color:var(--text2);transition:all .15s;white-space:nowrap;}
.btn:hover{background:var(--surface3);border-color:var(--border2);color:var(--text);}
.btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:default;}
.btn.primary{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.btn.primary:hover{background:#b05025;}
.btn.gold{background:var(--gold-light);border-color:#e0c070;color:var(--gold);}
.btn.gold:hover{background:#fcefd0;border-color:var(--gold);}
.btn.danger{background:#fde8e8;border-color:#f0b8b8;color:#c0392b;}
.btn.danger:hover{background:#fbd0d0;}
.btn.sm{padding:5px 11px;font-size:11px;}
.btn.purple{background:var(--purple-light,#f0ebf8);border-color:#c5aee8;color:var(--purple);}
.btn.purple:hover{background:#e8e0f5;}

.add-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.add-input{flex:1;background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:9px 15px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;min-width:0;}
.add-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.add-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(196,92,42,.1);}

/* TASK ITEMS */
.task-item{background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:11px 13px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;cursor:grab;transition:all .15s;position:relative;user-select:none;box-shadow:0 1px 3px var(--shadow);flex-shrink:0;}
.task-item:hover{border-color:var(--border2);background:var(--surface);box-shadow:0 2px 8px var(--shadow2);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.task-item.dragging{opacity:.4;cursor:grabbing;transform:none;}
.task-item.drag-over{border-color:var(--accent);border-style:dashed;background:#fef4ee;}
.drag-handle{color:var(--text3);font-size:13px;opacity:.4;flex-shrink:0;}
.task-item:hover .drag-handle{opacity:1;}
.task-check{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--border2);flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .15s;}
.task-check:hover{border-color:var(--accent2);background:var(--accent2-light);}
.task-check.on{background:var(--accent2);border-color:var(--accent2);}
.task-check.on::after{content:'✓';font-size:10px;color:#fff;font-weight:700;}
.task-body{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.task-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.task-status{font-size:10px;color:var(--accent);margin-top:2px;font-style:italic;font-weight:500;}
.task-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex-shrink:0;}
.attach-badge{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);}
.open-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;padding:3px 5px;border-radius:6px;transition:all .12s;flex-shrink:0;}
.open-btn:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-light);}

/* complete animation */
@keyframes completeSlide{from{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}to{opacity:0;transform:translateX(30px);}}
.task-item.completing{animation:completeSlide .3s ease forwards;}

.drop-zone-hint{border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:9px;text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:10px;transition:all .15s;font-style:italic;flex-shrink:0;}
.drop-zone-hint.active{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:#fef4ee;}

/* WEEK STRIP */
.strip-label{font-weight:700;font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text3);}
.week-row{display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:4px;}
.week-card{min-width:140px;background:var(--surface);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:12px;flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;box-shadow:0 1px 5px var(--shadow);}
.week-card:hover{border-color:var(--border2);box-shadow:0 3px 10px var(--shadow2);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.week-card.drop-target{border-color:var(--accent)!important;background:#fef4ee;}
.week-card.is-today{border-color:var(--accent);background:#fef4ee;}
.week-card-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:8px;}
.week-day-name{font-weight:700;font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.7px;color:var(--text3);}
.week-day-month{font-size:8px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:1px;}
.week-day-num{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:20px;color:var(--text);line-height:1;}
.week-pill{background:var(--surface2);border-radius:5px;padding:4px 7px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2);margin-bottom:3px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.week-pill.done{text-decoration:line-through;color:var(--text3);opacity:.5;}
.week-pill-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0;}
.week-pill.done .week-pill-dot{background:var(--text3);}
.week-empty{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;}

/* LOOKING FORWARD */
.lf-block{background:var(--surface);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:20px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px var(--shadow);position:relative;}
.lf-block::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--purple),#b8a0d8);border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;}
.lf-block.drop-active{border-color:var(--purple);background:#f8f4fc;}
.lf-title{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-weight:600;font-size:17px;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px;}
.lf-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:12px;}
.lf-list{overflow-y:auto;max-height:280px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.lf-list::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
.lf-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border2);border-radius:10px;}
.lf-item{background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px var(--shadow);transition:all .15s;flex-shrink:0;}
.lf-item:hover{border-color:var(--border2);background:var(--surface);}
.lf-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--purple);flex-shrink:0;opacity:.6;}
.lf-name{flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);min-width:0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.lf-remove{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;padding:2px 5px;border-radius:5px;transition:all .12s;}
.lf-remove:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-light);}
.lf-drop-hint{border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;transition:all .15s;}
.lf-block.drop-active .lf-drop-hint{border-color:var(--purple);color:var(--purple);background:rgba(139,111,181,.05);}
.lf-add-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.lf-add-input{flex:1;background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:8px 14px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;min-width:0;}
.lf-add-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.lf-add-input:focus{border-color:var(--purple);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(139,111,181,.1);}

/* MODALS */
.overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(60,40,20,.45);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:200;backdrop-filter:blur(5px);padding:16px;}
.modal{background:var(--surface);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:18px;padding:26px;width:100%;max-width:500px;max-height:90dvh;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;animation:mIn .18s ease;box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(60,40,20,.18);}
@keyframes mIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.95) translateY(8px);}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) translateY(0);}}
.modal-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;}
.modal-title{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-weight:600;font-size:18px;color:var(--text);flex:1;margin-right:10px;line-height:1.3;}
.modal-close{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text3);font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:7px;transition:all .12s;}
.modal-close:hover{background:var(--surface3);color:var(--text);}
.field label{display:block;font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text3);margin-bottom:5px;font-weight:700;}
.m-input{width:100%;background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 13px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;}
.m-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(196,92,42,.1);}
.m-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.m-textarea{width:100%;background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 13px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;resize:vertical;min-height:80px;transition:border-color .15s;line-height:1.6;}
.m-textarea:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(196,92,42,.1);}
.m-textarea::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.divider{height:1px;background:var(--border);}
.modal-footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding-top:4px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.footer-right{display:flex;gap:8px;}
.trash-btn{background:none;border:1.5px solid #f0b8b8;border-radius:20px;color:#c0392b;cursor:pointer;padding:6px 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;transition:all .15s;}
.trash-btn:hover{background:#fde8e8;}

/* ATTACHMENTS */
.file-drop{border:2px dashed var(--border2);border-radius:11px;padding:18px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:var(--surface2);position:relative;}
.file-drop:hover,.file-drop.over{border-color:var(--accent);background:#fef4ee;}
.file-drop input{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;cursor:pointer;width:100%;height:100%;}
.file-drop-icon{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.file-drop-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);}
.file-drop-sub{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;font-style:italic;}
.link-row{display:flex;gap:7px;}
.attach-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;}
.attach-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;padding:8px 11px;transition:all .12s;}
.attach-item:hover{border-color:var(--border2);background:var(--surface);}
.a-icon{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0;}
.a-icon.pdf{background:#fde8e8;}.a-icon.img{background:#e8f0e9;}.a-icon.doc{background:#e8eef8;}.a-icon.lnk{background:var(--gold-light);}.a-icon.def{background:var(--surface3);}
.a-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.a-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.a-meta{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;}
.a-remove{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;padding:2px 5px;border-radius:5px;transition:all .12s;}
.a-remove:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-light);}

/* SYNC */
.sync-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);padding:4px 0;}
.sync-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--text3);flex-shrink:0;}
.sync-dot.ok{background:var(--accent2);}
.sync-dot.err{background:#c0392b;}
.sync-dot.syncing{background:var(--gold);animation:pulse 1s infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.3;}}

/* MOBILE */
.mob-nav{display:none;}
@media(max-width:680px){
  .sidebar{display:none;}
  .main{padding:14px 12px 80px;}
  .day-block{padding:16px 14px;border-radius:14px;}
  .block-title{font-size:19px;}
  .block-sub{font-size:10px;}
  .add-input{font-size:14px;padding:10px 14px;}
  .task-item{padding:12px 11px;}
  .task-name{font-size:14px;}
  .week-card{min-width:120px;padding:10px;}
  .week-day-num{font-size:17px;}
  .lf-block{padding:16px 14px;}
  .overlay{align-items:flex-end;padding:0;}
  .modal{border-radius:18px 18px 0 0;max-height:92dvh;padding:22px 18px;padding-bottom:calc(22px + var(--safe-bottom));}
  .mob-nav{display:flex;position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:calc(58px + var(--safe-bottom));padding-bottom:var(--safe-bottom);background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);align-items:center;justify-content:space-around;z-index:100;box-shadow:0 -2px 10px var(--shadow);}
  .mob-btn{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text3);font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:10px;transition:all .15s;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.6px;}
  .mob-btn.active{color:var(--accent);}
  .mob-icon{font-size:20px;line-height:1;}
}

/* ── MEDIA / READING TRACKER ── */
.media-page{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;}
.media-block{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:22px;box-shadow:0 2px 14px var(--shadow);position:relative;}
.media-block::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent2),#6abf70);border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;z-index:1;}
.media-block-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:4px;}
.media-block-title{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:20px;color:var(--text);}
.media-block-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:16px;}
.media-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.media-entry{background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;transition:all .15s;}
.media-entry:hover{border-color:var(--border2);background:var(--surface);}
.media-entry-header{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;}
.media-entry-emoji{font-size:22px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;}
.media-entry-info{flex:1;min-width:0;cursor:pointer;}
.media-entry-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);}
.media-entry-author{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:2px;font-style:italic;}
.media-entry-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;flex-shrink:0;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end;}
.media-complete-btn{background:none;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;}
.media-complete-btn:hover{border-color:var(--accent2);color:var(--accent2);}
.media-complete-btn.done{background:var(--accent2-light);border-color:var(--accent2);color:var(--accent2);}
.media-edit-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:6px;transition:all .12s;}
.media-edit-btn:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-light);}
.media-remove-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:6px;transition:all .12s;}
.media-remove-btn:hover{color:#c0392b;background:#fde8e8;}

/* QUOTES */
.quotes-section{margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.quotes-label{font-size:9px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text3);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;}
.quote-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;}
.quote-card{background:var(--surface);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;position:relative;transition:all .12s;}
.quote-card:hover{border-color:var(--border2);}
.quote-text{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);font-style:italic;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:6px;padding-right:50px;}
.quote-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.quote-page{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);}
.quote-tag{background:var(--accent-light);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:2px 7px;font-size:9px;color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;}
.quote-actions{position:absolute;top:7px;right:7px;display:flex;gap:3px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s;}
.quote-card:hover .quote-actions{opacity:1;}
.quote-action-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:3px 5px;border-radius:5px;transition:all .12s;}
.quote-action-btn:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-light);}
.quote-action-btn.danger:hover{color:#c0392b;background:#fde8e8;}
.add-quote-row{display:flex;gap:7px;margin-top:10px;}
.add-quote-input{flex:1;background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:7px 13px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;min-width:0;}
.add-quote-input:focus{border-color:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(196,154,60,.1);}
.add-quote-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}

/* COMPLETED MEDIA */
.completed-media-block{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:22px;box-shadow:0 2px 14px var(--shadow);position:relative;}
.completed-media-block::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),#e8a040);border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;z-index:1;}
.completed-media-title{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:18px;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:14px;}
.completed-grid{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;}
.completed-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;}
.completed-item-emoji{font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0;}
.completed-item-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.completed-item-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.completed-item-author{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;}
.view-all-btn{display:block;width:100%;margin-top:14px;padding:10px;border:1.5px dashed var(--border2);border-radius:10px;background:none;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:all .15s;}
.view-all-btn:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-light);}

/* ALL COMPLETED PAGE */
.all-completed-page{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:24px;}
.all-completed-back{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:none;border:none;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text2);cursor:pointer;padding:0;transition:color .15s;}
.all-completed-back:hover{color:var(--accent);}
.all-completed-section{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.all-completed-section-title{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:17px;color:var(--text);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--border);}
.completed-full-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:12px 14px;background:var(--surface);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;transition:all .15s;}
.completed-full-item:hover{border-color:var(--border2);background:var(--surface2);}
.completed-full-info{flex:1;}
.completed-full-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);}
.completed-full-author{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;margin-top:2px;}
.completed-full-date{font-size:10px;color:var(--text3);margin-top:4px;}

/* SIDEBAR READING NAV */
.s-reading-link{padding:9px 10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s;border:1.5px solid transparent;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.s-reading-link:hover{background:var(--surface2);}
.s-reading-link.active{background:var(--surface2);border-color:var(--border);}
.s-reading-link-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text2);}

/* TAG CHIPS */
.tag-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;border-radius:8px;padding:2px 6px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3;white-space:nowrap;}
.tag-chip-x{background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:0 0 0 2px;font-size:9px;opacity:.6;line-height:1;color:inherit;}
.tag-chip-x:hover{opacity:1;}
.estimate-tag{background:var(--gold-light);border:1px solid #e0c070;border-radius:6px;padding:1px 7px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0;white-space:nowrap;}
.task-name-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:6px;}
.task-meta-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:3px;}
.task-date-label{font-size:9px;color:var(--text3);background:var(--surface3);border-radius:5px;padding:1px 5px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;}
.tag-swatch{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;border:2.5px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;transition:all .12s;flex-shrink:0;}
.tag-swatch.sel{transform:scale(1.2);}
.tag-swatches{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;}
.tag-chips-wrap{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:6px;min-height:22px;}

/* NEXT WEEK */
.nw-block{background:var(--surface);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:20px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px var(--shadow);position:relative;}
.nw-block::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:4px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#3d5af1,#7b97f0);border-radius:16px 16px 0 0;}
.nw-block.drop-active{border-color:#3d5af1;background:#f4f5fd;}
.nw-title{font-family:'Lora',serif;font-weight:600;font-size:17px;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px;}
.nw-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:12px;}
.nw-list{overflow-y:auto;max-height:280px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.nw-list::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;}
.nw-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border2);border-radius:10px;}
.nw-item{background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px var(--shadow);transition:all .15s;flex-shrink:0;cursor:grab;user-select:none;}
.nw-item:hover{border-color:var(--border2);background:var(--surface);}
.nw-item.dragging{opacity:.4;cursor:grabbing;}
.nw-item.drag-over{border-color:#3d5af1;border-style:dashed;background:#f4f5fd;}
.nw-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#3d5af1;flex-shrink:0;opacity:.7;}
.nw-name{flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);min-width:0;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.nw-remove{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text3);cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;padding:2px 5px;border-radius:5px;transition:all .12s;}
.nw-remove:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-light);}
.nw-drop-hint{border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--text3);font-style:italic;transition:all .15s;}
.nw-block.drop-active .nw-drop-hint{border-color:#3d5af1;color:#3d5af1;background:rgba(61,90,241,.04);}
.nw-add-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.nw-add-input{flex:1;background:var(--surface2);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:8px 14px;font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--text);outline:none;transition:border-color .15s;min-width:0;}
.nw-add-input::placeholder{color:var(--text3);}
.nw-add-input:focus{border-color:#3d5af1;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(61,90,241,.1);}
.btn.navy{background:#eef0fb;border-color:#b0bce8;color:#3d5af1;}
.btn.navy:hover{background:#e0e4f8;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="root"></div>
<script type="text/babel">
const {useState,useEffect,useRef}=React;
const DAYS=['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'];
const MONTHS=['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December'];
const MS=['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];

const SUPA_URL='https://fcgebmeefugxtaddpgvi.supabase.co';
const SUPA_KEY='eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImZjZ2VibWVlZnVneHRhZGRwZ3ZpIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzIyMzUxMTUsImV4cCI6MjA4NzgxMTExNX0.zcQfE9XnlIHqS2Atm5tTW_fVlmjX4MaaL6Y61tIXmyk';
const sb=supabase.createClient(SUPA_URL,SUPA_KEY);

const next8=()=>Array.from({length:8},(_,i)=>{const d=new Date();d.setDate(d.getDate()+i);return d;});
const dk=d=>d.getFullYear()+'-'+d.getMonth()+'-'+d.getDate();
const uid=()=>Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);
const fIcon=n=>{if(!n)return{icon:'🔗',cls:'lnk'};const e=n.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();if(['jpg','jpeg','png','gif','webp','svg'].includes(e))return{icon:'🖼',cls:'img'};if(e==='pdf')return{icon:'📄',cls:'pdf'};if(['doc','docx','txt','md'].includes(e))return{icon:'📝',cls:'doc'};return{icon:'📎',cls:'def'};};
const fmtSize=b=>{if(!b)return'';if(b<1024)return b+' B';if(b<1048576)return(b/1024).toFixed(1)+' KB';return(b/1048576).toFixed(1)+' MB';};

const CLIENT_ID='992169341355-40u7rg338i4jrhmrbu5hivedkvd0dqqs.apps.googleusercontent.com';
const SCOPES='https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar.events';
function getToken(){return new Promise((res,rej)=>{if(!window.google){rej(new Error('Google not loaded'));return;}window.google.accounts.oauth2.initTokenClient({client_id:CLIENT_ID,scope:SCOPES,callback:r=>{if(r.error)rej(new Error(r.error));else res(r.access_token);}}).requestAccessToken();});}
async function pushCal(date,tasks){
  const token=await getToken();
  const ds=`${date.getFullYear()}-${String(date.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(date.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')}`;
  const list=tasks.filter(t=>!t.complete).map(t=>`• ${t.name}`).join('\n');
  const body=JSON.stringify({summary:'Task Bloc',colorId:'6',description:`TaskBloc tasks for ${ds}\n\n${list}\n\n🔗 ${window.location.href}`,start:{dateTime:`${ds}T08:00:00`,timeZone:Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone},end:{dateTime:`${ds}T09:00:00`,timeZone:Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone}});
  const r=await fetch('https://www.googleapis.com/calendar/v3/calendars/primary/events',{method:'POST',headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`,'Content-Type':'application/json'},body});
  if(!r.ok)throw new Error('Calendar API '+r.status);
  return r.json();
}

// ── OFFLINE QUEUE ──
const QUEUE_KEY='taskbloc_queue';
function qLoad(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(QUEUE_KEY))||[];}catch{return[];}}
function qSave(q){localStorage.setItem(QUEUE_KEY,JSON.stringify(q));}
function qAdd(op){const q=qLoad();q.push(op);qSave(q);}

async function qFlush(){
  if(!navigator.onLine)return;
  const q=qLoad();
  if(q.length===0)return;
  qSave([]); // optimistically clear
  try{
    await Promise.all(q.map(op=>{
      if(op.type==='upsertTask')return sb.from('tasks').upsert(op.data);
      if(op.type==='deleteTask')return sb.from('tasks').delete().eq('id',op.id);
      if(op.type==='upsertForward')return sb.from('forward_tasks').upsert(op.data);
      if(op.type==='deleteForward')return sb.from('forward_tasks').delete().eq('id',op.id);
      if(op.type==='upsertNextWeek')return sb.from('next_week').upsert(op.data);
      if(op.type==='deleteNextWeek')return sb.from('next_week').delete().eq('id',op.id);
    }));
  }catch(e){
    // restore queue if flush fails
    const remaining=qLoad();
    qSave([...q,...remaining]);
    throw e;
  }
}

// Flush queue whenever we come back online
window.addEventListener('online',()=>qFlush().catch(console.error));

async function dbLoadTasks(){
  if(!navigator.onLine){
    // Return cached data from localStorage if offline
    try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('taskbloc_tasks'))||{};}catch{return{};}
  }
  const{data,error}=await sb.from('tasks').select('*').order('position');
  if(error)throw error;
  const map={};(data||[]).forEach(r=>{if(!map[r.day_key])map[r.day_key]=[];map[r.day_key].push({id:r.id,name:r.name,status:r.status,context:r.context,complete:r.complete,attachments:r.attachments||[],tags:r.tags||[],due:r.due||'',start:r.start||'',estimate:r.estimate||''});});
  return map;
}

  if(!navigator.onLine){
    try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('taskbloc_forward'))||[];}catch{return[];}
  }

  return(data||[]).map(r=>({id:r.id,name:r.name,status:r.status,context:r.context,complete:r.complete,attachments:r.attachments||[],tags:r.tags||[],due:r.due||'',start:r.start||'',estimate:r.estimate||''}));
}
async function dbUpsertTask(task,dayKey,position){
  const data={id:task.id,day_key:dayKey,name:task.name,status:task.status,context:task.context,complete:task.complete,attachments:task.attachments,tags:task.tags||[],due:task.due||'',start:task.start||'',estimate:task.estimate||'',position};
  if(!navigator.onLine){qAdd({type:'upsertTask',data});return;}
  try{await sb.from('tasks').upsert(data);}catch(e){qAdd({type:'upsertTask',data});throw e;}
}

function Attachments({attachments,onChange}){
  const [link,setLink]=useState('');const [over,setOver]=useState(false);
  const addFiles=fs=>{const n=Array.from(fs).map(f=>({id:uid(),name:f.name,size:f.size,type:'file',url:null}));onChange([...attachments,...n]);};
  const addLink=()=>{if(!link.trim())return;const url=link.trim();onChange([...attachments,{id:uid(),name:url.replace(/^https?:\/\//,'').split('/')[0],url,type:'link',size:null}]);setLink('');};
  const remove=id=>onChange(attachments.filter(a=>a.id!==id));
  return(<div style={{display:'flex',flexDirection:'column',gap:'9px'}}>
    <div className={'file-drop'+(over?' over':'')} onDragOver={e=>{e.preventDefault();setOver(true);}} onDragLeave={()=>setOver(false)} onDrop={e=>{e.preventDefault();setOver(false);addFiles(e.dataTransfer.files);}}>
      <input type="file" multiple onChange={e=>addFiles(e.target.files)}/><div className="file-drop-icon">📁</div><div className="file-drop-label">Drop files or tap to browse</div><div className="file-drop-sub">Syncs once storage connected</div>
    </div>
    <div className="link-row"><input className="m-input" placeholder="Paste a link (Drive, Notion, Dropbox…)" value={link} onChange={e=>setLink(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==='Enter'&&addLink()}/><button className="btn sm" onClick={addLink}>Add</button></div>
    {attachments.length>0&&<div className="attach-list">{attachments.map(a=>{const{icon,cls}=a.type==='link'?{icon:'🔗',cls:'lnk'}:fIcon(a.name);return(<div key={a.id} className="attach-item"><div className={'a-icon '+cls}>{icon}</div><div className="a-info"><div className="a-name">{a.name}</div><div className="a-meta">{a.type==='link'?a.url:fmtSize(a.size)+' · pending'}</div></div><button className="a-remove" onClick={()=>remove(a.id)}>✕</button></div>);})}</div>}
  </div>);
}

const TAG_COLORS=['#e74c3c','#e67e22','#f39c12','#27ae60','#1abc9c','#2980b9','#8e44ad','#e91e8c'];

function TaskModal({task,onClose,onSave,onDelete}){
  const [name,setName]=useState(task.name||'');
  const [status,setStatus]=useState(task.status||'');
  const [context,setContext]=useState(task.context||'');
  const [attachments,setAttachments]=useState(task.attachments||[]);
  const [tags,setTags]=useState(task.tags||[]);
  const [tagInput,setTagInput]=useState('');
  const [tagColor,setTagColor]=useState(TAG_COLORS[5]);
  const [due,setDue]=useState(task.due||'');
  const [start,setStart]=useState(task.start||'');
  const [estimate,setEstimate]=useState(task.estimate||'');
  const [confirming,setConfirming]=useState(false);
  const addTag=()=>{if(!tagInput.trim())return;setTags(prev=>[...prev,{label:tagInput.trim(),color:tagColor}]);setTagInput('');};
  const removeTag=i=>setTags(prev=>prev.filter((_,j)=>j!==i));
  if(confirming)return(<div className="overlay" onClick={e=>e.target===e.currentTarget&&setConfirming(false)}><div className="modal" style={{maxWidth:360}}><div className="modal-header"><div className="modal-title">Delete this task?</div><button className="modal-close" onClick={()=>setConfirming(false)}>✕</button></div><p style={{fontSize:'13px',color:'var(--text2)',lineHeight:1.6}}><strong style={{color:'var(--text)'}}>{task.name}</strong> will be permanently removed.</p><div className="modal-footer"><div/><div className="footer-right"><button className="btn" onClick={()=>setConfirming(false)}>Cancel</button><button className="btn danger" onClick={onDelete}>Delete</button></div></div></div></div>);
  return(<div className="overlay" onClick={e=>e.target===e.currentTarget&&onClose()}>
    <div className="modal">
      <div className="modal-header"><div className="modal-title">{name||'Untitled'}</div><button className="modal-close" onClick={onClose}>✕</button></div>
      <div className="field"><label>Task Name</label><input className="m-input" value={name} onChange={e=>setName(e.target.value)} placeholder="What needs doing?"/></div>
      <div className="field"><label>Status</label><input className="m-input" value={status} onChange={e=>setStatus(e.target.value)} placeholder="in progress, waiting on, blocked…"/></div>
      <div style={{display:'grid',gridTemplateColumns:'1fr 1fr 1fr',gap:'10px'}}>
        <div className="field"><label>Start</label><input className="m-input" value={start} onChange={e=>setStart(e.target.value)} placeholder="Mar 10"/></div>
        <div className="field"><label>Due</label><input className="m-input" value={due} onChange={e=>setDue(e.target.value)} placeholder="Mar 15"/></div>
        <div className="field"><label>Estimate</label><input className="m-input" value={estimate} onChange={e=>setEstimate(e.target.value)} placeholder="2h"/></div>
      </div>
      <div className="field">
        <label>Tags</label>
        <div style={{display:'flex',gap:'6px',alignItems:'center'}}>
          <input className="m-input" style={{flex:1}} value={tagInput} onChange={e=>setTagInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==='Enter'&&addTag()} placeholder="Tag label…"/>
          <button className="btn sm" onClick={addTag}>Add</button>
        </div>
        <div className="tag-swatches">
          {TAG_COLORS.map(c=><div key={c} className={'tag-swatch'+(tagColor===c?' sel':'')} style={{background:c,borderColor:tagColor===c?'#333':c+'55'}} onClick={()=>setTagColor(c)} title={c}/>)}
        </div>
        {tags.length>0&&<div className="tag-chips-wrap">
          {tags.map((t,i)=><span key={i} className="tag-chip" style={{background:t.color+'22',border:`1px solid ${t.color}`,color:t.color}}>
            {t.label}<button className="tag-chip-x" onClick={()=>removeTag(i)}>✕</button>
          </span>)}
        </div>}
      </div>
      <div className="field"><label>Context & Notes</label><textarea className="m-textarea" value={context} onChange={e=>setContext(e.target.value)} placeholder="Notes, links, context…"/></div>
      <div className="divider"/>
      <div className="field"><label>Attachments{attachments.length>0?' · '+attachments.length:''}</label><Attachments attachments={attachments} onChange={setAttachments}/></div>
      <div className="modal-footer">
        <button className="trash-btn" onClick={()=>setConfirming(true)}>🗑 Delete</button>
        <div className="footer-right"><button className="btn" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</button><button className="btn primary" onClick={()=>{onSave({...task,name,status,context,attachments,tags,due,start,estimate});onClose();}}>Save</button></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>);
}

/* DONE BADGES COMPONENT */
function DoneBadges({tasks}){
  const [open,setOpen]=useState(false);
  const done=tasks.filter(t=>t.complete);
  if(done.length===0)return null;
  const visible=done.slice(0,5);
  return(
    <div style={{position:'relative',display:'inline-block'}}>
      <div className="done-badges" onClick={()=>setOpen(o=>!o)}>
        {visible.map((_,i)=><div key={i} className="done-badge">✓</div>)}
        {done.length>5&&<div className="done-badge" style={{background:'var(--text3)',fontSize:'8px'}}>+{done.length-5}</div>}
      </div>
      {open&&(
        <div className="done-bubble">
          <div className="done-bubble-title">Completed today</div>
          {done.map(t=>(
            <div key={t.id} className="done-bubble-item">
              <div className="done-bubble-check">✓</div>
              <span style={{flex:1,overflow:'hidden',textOverflow:'ellipsis',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>{t.name}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
          <span className="done-bubble-close" onClick={()=>setOpen(false)}>close</span>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

function TaskItem({task,onToggle,onOpen,onDragStart,onDragOver,onDrop,isDragging,isDragOver}){
  const [completing,setCompleting]=useState(false);
  const handleToggle=()=>{
    if(!task.complete){setCompleting(true);setTimeout(()=>{onToggle(task.id);setCompleting(false);},280);}
    else onToggle(task.id);
  };
  return(<div className={'task-item'+(isDragging?' dragging':'')+(isDragOver?' drag-over':'')+(completing?' completing':'')} draggable onDragStart={e=>onDragStart(e,task.id)} onDragOver={e=>{e.preventDefault();onDragOver(task.id);}} onDrop={e=>{e.preventDefault();onDrop(task.id);}}>
    <span className="drag-handle">⠿</span>
    <div className={'task-check'+(task.complete?' on':'')} onClick={handleToggle}/>
    <div className="task-body">
      <div className="task-name-row"><div className="task-name">{task.name}</div>{task.estimate&&<span className="estimate-tag">{task.estimate}</span>}</div>
      {task.status&&<div className="task-status">{task.status}</div>}
      {((task.tags&&task.tags.length>0)||task.start||task.due)&&<div className="task-meta-row">
        {(task.tags||[]).map((t,i)=><span key={i} className="tag-chip" style={{background:t.color+'22',border:`1px solid ${t.color}`,color:t.color,fontSize:'8px',padding:'1px 5px'}}>{t.label}</span>)}
        {task.start&&<span className="task-date-label">Start: {task.start}</span>}
        {task.due&&<span className="task-date-label">Due: {task.due}</span>}
      </div>}
    </div>
    <div className="task-meta">{(task.attachments||[]).length>0&&<span className="attach-badge">📎{task.attachments.length}</span>}<button className="open-btn" onClick={()=>onOpen(task)}>↗</button></div>
  </div>);
}

function DayBlock({date,tasks,isToday,onAdd,onToggle,onOpen,onUpdateTasks,onMoveTask,onSendCal}){
  const [newName,setNewName]=useState('');const [dragOver,setDragOver]=useState(null);const [draggingId,setDraggingId]=useState(null);const [zoneActive,setZoneActive]=useState(false);const [calStatus,setCalStatus]=useState('idle');
  const key=dk(date);
  const hDragStart=(e,id)=>{setDraggingId(id);e.dataTransfer.setData('taskId',id);e.dataTransfer.setData('fromDay',key);};
  const hDrop=tid=>{if(!draggingId||draggingId===tid){setDraggingId(null);setDragOver(null);return;}const fi=tasks.findIndex(t=>t.id===draggingId),ti=tasks.findIndex(t=>t.id===tid);if(fi===-1||ti===-1)return;const arr=[...tasks];const[m]=arr.splice(fi,1);arr.splice(ti,0,m);onUpdateTasks(key,arr);setDraggingId(null);setDragOver(null);};
  const hZoneDrop=e=>{e.preventDefault();const tid=e.dataTransfer.getData('taskId'),fd=e.dataTransfer.getData('fromDay');if(fd&&fd!==key)onMoveTask(fd,key,tid);setZoneActive(false);};
  const add=()=>{if(!newName.trim())return;onAdd(key,newName.trim());setNewName('');};
  const sendCal=async()=>{
    setCalStatus('sending');
    try{await pushCal(date,tasks);setCalStatus('sent');setTimeout(()=>setCalStatus('idle'),3000);}
    catch(e){setCalStatus('error');setTimeout(()=>setCalStatus('idle'),3000);}
  };
  const inc=tasks.filter(t=>!t.complete);
  const calLabel=calStatus==='sending'?'sending…':calStatus==='sent'?'sent ✓':calStatus==='error'?'error':'send to calendar';
  return(
    <div className="day-block">
      <div className="block-header">
        <div>
          <div className="block-title-row">
            <div className="block-title">{isToday?'Today':DAYS[date.getDay()]}</div>
            <DoneBadges tasks={tasks}/>
          </div>
          <div className="block-sub">{DAYS[date.getDay()]}, {MONTHS[date.getMonth()]} {date.getDate()}{inc.length>0&&' · '+inc.length+' open'}</div>
        </div>
        <button className={'btn gold'+(calStatus==='sent'?' primary':'')} onClick={sendCal} disabled={calStatus==='sending'} style={calStatus==='sent'?{background:'var(--accent2)',borderColor:'var(--accent2)',color:'#fff'}:{}}>{calLabel}</button>
      </div>
      <div className="add-row"><input className="add-input" placeholder="Add a task…" value={newName} onChange={e=>setNewName(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==='Enter'&&add()}/><button className="btn primary" onClick={add}>Add</button></div>
      <div className="task-list-wrap">
        {tasks.filter(t=>!t.complete).length===0&&tasks.filter(t=>t.complete).length===0&&<div style={{fontSize:'12px',color:'var(--text3)',fontStyle:'italic',padding:'6px 2px'}}>Nothing here yet.</div>}
        {inc.map(t=><TaskItem key={t.id} task={t} onToggle={id=>onToggle(key,id)} onOpen={onOpen} onDragStart={hDragStart} onDragOver={setDragOver} onDrop={hDrop} isDragging={draggingId===t.id} isDragOver={dragOver===t.id}/>)}
      </div>
      <div className={'drop-zone-hint'+(zoneActive?' active':'')} onDragOver={e=>{e.preventDefault();setZoneActive(true);}} onDragLeave={()=>setZoneActive(false)} onDrop={hZoneDrop}>drag a task here from another day</div>
    </div>
  );
}

function LookingForward({items,onDrop,onRemove,onOpen,onAdd}){
  const [active,setActive]=useState(false);
  const [newName,setNewName]=useState('');
  const hDrop=e=>{e.preventDefault();const tid=e.dataTransfer.getData('taskId'),fd=e.dataTransfer.getData('fromDay');if(tid&&fd)onDrop(fd,tid);setActive(false);};
  const add=()=>{if(!newName.trim())return;onAdd(newName.trim());setNewName('');};
  return(<div className={'lf-block'+(active?' drop-active':'')} onDragOver={e=>{e.preventDefault();setActive(true);}} onDragLeave={()=>setActive(false)} onDrop={hDrop}>
    <div className="lf-title">Looking Forward</div>
    <div className="lf-sub">Tasks beyond this week.</div>
    <div className="lf-add-row">
      <input className="lf-add-input" placeholder="Add a future task…" value={newName} onChange={e=>setNewName(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==='Enter'&&add()}/>
      <button className="btn sm purple" onClick={add}>Add</button>
    </div>
    {items.length>0&&<div className="lf-list">{items.map(t=>(<div key={t.id} className="lf-item"><span className="lf-dot"/><span className="lf-name">{t.name}</span>{t.status&&<span style={{fontSize:'10px',color:'var(--purple)',fontStyle:'italic',flexShrink:0}}>{t.status}</span>}{(t.attachments||[]).length>0&&<span style={{fontSize:'10px',color:'var(--text3)',flexShrink:0}}>📎{t.attachments.length}</span>}<button className="open-btn" style={{flexShrink:0}} onClick={()=>onOpen(t)}>↗</button><button className="lf-remove" onClick={()=>onRemove(t.id)}>✕</button></div>))}</div>}
    <div className="lf-drop-hint">{items.length===0?'Drop tasks here to save for later':'Drop more tasks here'}</div>
  </div>);
}

function NextWeek({items,onDrop,onRemove,onOpen,onAdd,onToggle,onUpdateItems}){
  const [active,setActive]=useState(false);
  const [newName,setNewName]=useState('');
  const [dragOver,setDragOver]=useState(null);
  const [draggingId,setDraggingId]=useState(null);
  const hExternalDrop=e=>{
    e.preventDefault();
    const tid=e.dataTransfer.getData('taskId'),fd=e.dataTransfer.getData('fromDay');
    if(tid&&fd)onDrop(fd,tid);
    setActive(false);
  };
  const hItemDragStart=(e,id)=>{setDraggingId(id);e.dataTransfer.setData('nwId',id);};
  const hItemDrop=(e,tid)=>{
    e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();
    if(!draggingId||draggingId===tid){setDraggingId(null);setDragOver(null);return;}
    const fi=items.findIndex(t=>t.id===draggingId),ti=items.findIndex(t=>t.id===tid);
    if(fi===-1||ti===-1)return;
    const arr=[...items];const[m]=arr.splice(fi,1);arr.splice(ti,0,m);
    onUpdateItems(arr);setDraggingId(null);setDragOver(null);
  };
  const add=()=>{if(!newName.trim())return;onAdd(newName.trim());setNewName('');};
  return(<div className={'nw-block'+(active?' drop-active':'')}
    onDragOver={e=>{e.preventDefault();if(e.dataTransfer.types.includes('fromday'))setActive(true);}}
    onDragLeave={e=>{if(!e.currentTarget.contains(e.relatedTarget))setActive(false);}}
    onDrop={hExternalDrop}>
    <div className="nw-title">Next Week</div>
    <div className="nw-sub">Tasks lined up for next week.</div>
    <div className="nw-add-row">
      <input className="nw-add-input" placeholder="Add a next-week task…" value={newName} onChange={e=>setNewName(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==='Enter'&&add()}/>
      <button className="btn sm navy" onClick={add}>Add</button>
    </div>
    {items.length>0&&<div className="nw-list">{items.map(t=>(
      <div key={t.id} className={'nw-item'+(draggingId===t.id?' dragging':'')+(dragOver===t.id?' drag-over':'')}
        draggable
        onDragStart={e=>hItemDragStart(e,t.id)}
        onDragOver={e=>{e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();setDragOver(t.id);}}
        onDragLeave={e=>e.stopPropagation()}
        onDrop={e=>hItemDrop(e,t.id)}
        onDragEnd={()=>{setDraggingId(null);setDragOver(null);}}>
        <span className="drag-handle">⠿</span>
        <div className={'task-check'+(t.complete?' on':'')} onClick={()=>onToggle(t.id)}/>
        <span className="nw-dot"/>
        <span className="nw-name" style={t.complete?{textDecoration:'line-through',opacity:.5}:{}}>{t.name}</span>
        {t.status&&<span style={{fontSize:'10px',color:'#3d5af1',fontStyle:'italic',flexShrink:0,maxWidth:'80px',overflow:'hidden',textOverflow:'ellipsis',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>{t.status}</span>}
        {(t.attachments||[]).length>0&&<span style={{fontSize:'10px',color:'var(--text3)',flexShrink:0}}>📎{t.attachments.length}</span>}
        <button className="open-btn" style={{flexShrink:0}} onClick={()=>onOpen(t)}>↗</button>
        <button className="nw-remove" onClick={()=>onRemove(t.id)}>✕</button>
      </div>
    ))}</div>}
    <div className="nw-drop-hint">{items.length===0?'Drop tasks here for next week':'Drop more tasks here'}</div>
  </div>);
}

function SyncStatus({status}){
  const [online,setOnline]=React.useState(navigator.onLine);
  React.useEffect(()=>{
    const on=()=>setOnline(true);
    const off=()=>setOnline(false);
    window.addEventListener('online',on);
    window.addEventListener('offline',off);
    return()=>{window.removeEventListener('online',on);window.removeEventListener('offline',off);};
  },[]);
  if(!online)return(<div className="sync-bar"><div className="sync-dot err"/><span>offline — changes will sync when reconnected</span></div>);
  const cls=status==='ok'?'ok':status==='error'?'err':status==='syncing'?'syncing':'';
  const label=status==='ok'?'synced':status==='error'?'sync error':status==='syncing'?'syncing…':'connecting…';
  return(<div className="sync-bar"><div className={'sync-dot '+cls}/><span>{label}</span></div>);
}

// ── MEDIA TRACKER ──
const MEDIA_KEY='taskbloc_media';
const MEDIA_EMOJI={book:'📚',article:'📰',podcast:'🎙️'};
const MEDIA_LABEL={book:'Book',article:'Article',podcast:'Podcast'};
function mediaLoad(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(MEDIA_KEY))||[];}catch{return[];}}
function mediaSave(items){localStorage.setItem(MEDIA_KEY,JSON.stringify(items));}

function QuoteEditModal({quote,mediaType,onClose,onSave}){
  const [text,setText]=useState(quote.text);
  const [page,setPage]=useState(quote.page||'');
  const [tagsStr,setTagsStr]=useState((quote.tags||[]).join(', '));
  const save=()=>{
    if(!text.trim())return;
    const tags=tagsStr.split(',').map(t=>t.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    onSave({...quote,text:text.trim(),page:page.trim(),tags});
  };
  return(<div className="overlay" onClick={e=>e.target===e.currentTarget&&onClose()}>
    <div className="modal" style={{maxWidth:460}}>
      <div className="modal-header"><div className="modal-title">Edit Quote</div><button className="modal-close" onClick={onClose}>✕</button></div>
      <div className="field"><label>Quote Text</label><textarea className="m-textarea" value={text} onChange={e=>setText(e.target.value)} placeholder="Enter the quote…" style={{minHeight:'100px'}}/></div>
      {mediaType==='book'&&<div className="field"><label>Page Number</label><input className="m-input" value={page} onChange={e=>setPage(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. 42"/></div>}
      <div className="field"><label>Tags (comma-separated)</label><input className="m-input" value={tagsStr} onChange={e=>setTagsStr(e.target.value)} placeholder="insight, philosophy, …"/></div>
      <div className="modal-footer"><div/><div className="footer-right"><button className="btn" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</button><button className="btn primary" onClick={save}>Save</button></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>);
}

function QuoteCard({quote,mediaType,onEdit,onRemove}){
  return(<div className="quote-card">
    <div className="quote-actions">
      <button className="quote-action-btn" title="Edit quote" onClick={()=>onEdit(quote)}>✎</button>
      <button className="quote-action-btn danger" title="Remove quote" onClick={()=>onRemove(quote.id)}>✕</button>
    </div>
    <div className="quote-text">"{quote.text}"</div>
    <div className="quote-meta">
      {mediaType==='book'&&quote.page&&<span className="quote-page">p. {quote.page}</span>}
      {(quote.tags||[]).map(tag=><span key={tag} className="quote-tag">{tag}</span>)}
    </div>
  </div>);
}

function MediaEntryModal({entry,onClose,onSave,onDelete}){
  const isNew=!entry.id;
  const [type,setType]=useState(entry.type||'book');
  const [title,setTitle]=useState(entry.title||'');
  const [author,setAuthor]=useState(entry.author||'');
  const [confirming,setConfirming]=useState(false);
  if(confirming)return(<div className="overlay" onClick={e=>e.target===e.currentTarget&&setConfirming(false)}><div className="modal" style={{maxWidth:360}}><div className="modal-header"><div className="modal-title">Remove this entry?</div><button className="modal-close" onClick={()=>setConfirming(false)}>✕</button></div><p style={{fontSize:'13px',color:'var(--text2)',lineHeight:1.6}}><strong style={{color:'var(--text)'}}>{entry.title||'This entry'}</strong> and all its quotes will be removed.</p><div className="modal-footer"><div/><div className="footer-right"><button className="btn" onClick={()=>setConfirming(false)}>Cancel</button><button className="btn danger" onClick={onDelete}>Remove</button></div></div></div></div>);
  const save=()=>{if(!title.trim())return;onSave({...entry,id:entry.id||uid(),type,title:title.trim(),author:author.trim(),status:entry.status||'reading',completedAt:entry.completedAt||null,quotes:entry.quotes||[]});};
  return(<div className="overlay" onClick={e=>e.target===e.currentTarget&&onClose()}>
    <div className="modal" style={{maxWidth:440}}>
      <div className="modal-header"><div className="modal-title">{isNew?'Add to Reading List':'Edit Entry'}</div><button className="modal-close" onClick={onClose}>✕</button></div>
      <div className="field"><label>Type</label><div style={{display:'flex',gap:'8px'}}>
        {['book','article','podcast'].map(t=><button key={t} className={'btn sm'+(type===t?' primary':'')} onClick={()=>setType(t)}>{MEDIA_EMOJI[t]} {MEDIA_LABEL[t]}</button>)}
      </div></div>
      <div className="field"><label>Title</label><input className="m-input" value={title} onChange={e=>setTitle(e.target.value)} placeholder={type==='book'?'Book title…':type==='article'?'Article title…':'Podcast episode or show…'}/></div>
      <div className="field"><label>{type==='podcast'?'Host / Show':'Author'}</label><input className="m-input" value={author} onChange={e=>setAuthor(e.target.value)} placeholder={type==='book'?'Author name…':type==='article'?'Author or publication…':'Podcast host or show name…'}/></div>
      <div className="modal-footer">
        {!isNew&&onDelete?<button className="trash-btn" onClick={()=>setConfirming(true)}>🗑 Remove</button>:<div/>}
        <div className="footer-right"><button className="btn" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</button><button className="btn primary" onClick={save}>{isNew?'Add':'Save'}</button></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>);
}

function MediaEntry({item,onEdit,onRemove,onToggleComplete,onUpdateQuotes}){
  const [expanded,setExpanded]=useState(false);
  const [newQuote,setNewQuote]=useState('');
  const [editingQuote,setEditingQuote]=useState(null);
  const emoji=MEDIA_EMOJI[item.type]||'📄';
  const quoteCount=(item.quotes||[]).length;
  const addQuote=()=>{
    if(!newQuote.trim())return;
    const q={id:uid(),text:newQuote.trim(),page:'',tags:[]};
    onUpdateQuotes(item.id,[...(item.quotes||[]),q]);
    setNewQuote('');
    setExpanded(true);
  };
  const removeQuote=qid=>onUpdateQuotes(item.id,(item.quotes||[]).filter(q=>q.id!==qid));
  const saveEditedQuote=uq=>onUpdateQuotes(item.id,(item.quotes||[]).map(q=>q.id===uq.id?uq:q));
  return(<div className="media-entry">
    <div className="media-entry-header">
      <div className="media-entry-emoji">{emoji}</div>
      <div className="media-entry-info" onClick={()=>quoteCount>0&&setExpanded(e=>!e)}>
        <div className="media-entry-title">{item.title}</div>
        {item.author&&<div className="media-entry-author">{item.author}</div>}
        {quoteCount>0&&<div style={{fontSize:'10px',color:'var(--text3)',marginTop:'3px'}}>{quoteCount} quote{quoteCount!==1?'s':''} {expanded?'▲':'▼'}</div>}
      </div>
      <div className="media-entry-actions">
        <button className={'media-complete-btn'+(item.status==='completed'?' done':'')} onClick={()=>onToggleComplete(item.id)}>{item.status==='completed'?'✓ Done':'Mark Done'}</button>
        <button className="media-edit-btn" title="Edit" onClick={()=>onEdit(item)}>✎</button>
        <button className="media-remove-btn" title="Remove" onClick={()=>onRemove(item.id)}>✕</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    {expanded&&quoteCount>0&&<div className="quotes-section">
      <div className="quotes-label">Saved Quotes</div>
      <div className="quote-list">
        {(item.quotes||[]).map(q=><QuoteCard key={q.id} quote={q} mediaType={item.type} onEdit={setEditingQuote} onRemove={removeQuote}/>)}
      </div>
    </div>}
    <div className="add-quote-row">
      <input className="add-quote-input" placeholder={`Save a quote from this ${MEDIA_LABEL[item.type]||'work'}…`} value={newQuote} onChange={e=>setNewQuote(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==='Enter'&&addQuote()}/>
      <button className="btn sm gold" onClick={addQuote}>+ Quote</button>
    </div>
    {editingQuote&&<QuoteEditModal quote={editingQuote} mediaType={item.type} onClose={()=>setEditingQuote(null)} onSave={uq=>{saveEditedQuote(uq);setEditingQuote(null);}}/>}
  </div>);
}

function CompletedMediaSection({items,onViewAll}){
  if(items.length===0)return null;
  const byType={book:[],article:[],podcast:[]};
  items.forEach(it=>{if(byType[it.type])byType[it.type].push(it);});
  const recent=[];
  ['book','article','podcast'].forEach(t=>{const sorted=[...byType[t]].sort((a,b)=>(b.completedAt||0)-(a.completedAt||0));recent.push(...sorted.slice(0,2));});
  if(recent.length===0)return null;
  return(<div className="completed-media-block">
    <div className="completed-media-title">Completed Media</div>
    <div className="completed-grid">
      {recent.map(it=><div key={it.id} className="completed-item">
        <span className="completed-item-emoji">{MEDIA_EMOJI[it.type]}</span>
        <div className="completed-item-info">
          <div className="completed-item-title">{it.title}</div>
          {it.author&&<div className="completed-item-author">{it.author}</div>}
        </div>
      </div>)}
    </div>
    <button className="view-all-btn" onClick={onViewAll}>View All Completed →</button>
  </div>);
}

function AllCompletedPage({items,onBack}){
  const byType={book:[],article:[],podcast:[]};
  items.forEach(it=>{if(byType[it.type])byType[it.type].push(it);});
  const sorted=t=>[...byType[t]].sort((a,b)=>(b.completedAt||0)-(a.completedAt||0));
  const fmtDate=ts=>{if(!ts)return'';const d=new Date(ts);return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'short',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'});};
  return(<div className="all-completed-page">
    <button className="all-completed-back" onClick={onBack}>← Back to Reading</button>
    <div style={{fontFamily:"'Lora',serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:'22px',color:'var(--text)'}}>All Completed</div>
    {['book','article','podcast'].map(t=>{const list=sorted(t);if(list.length===0)return null;return(<div key={t} className="all-completed-section">
      <div className="all-completed-section-title">{MEDIA_EMOJI[t]} {MEDIA_LABEL[t]}s</div>
      {list.map(it=><div key={it.id} className="completed-full-item">
        <div style={{fontSize:'22px',flexShrink:0}}>{MEDIA_EMOJI[t]}</div>
        <div className="completed-full-info">
          <div className="completed-full-title">{it.title}</div>
          {it.author&&<div className="completed-full-author">{it.author}</div>}
          {it.completedAt&&<div className="completed-full-date">Completed {fmtDate(it.completedAt)}</div>}
          {(it.quotes||[]).length>0&&<div style={{fontSize:'10px',color:'var(--text3)',marginTop:'4px'}}>{it.quotes.length} quote{it.quotes.length!==1?'s':''} saved</div>}
        </div>
      </div>)}
    </div>);})}
  </div>);
}

function MediaPage({items,onAdd,onEdit,onRemove,onToggleComplete,onUpdateQuotes,onViewAll}){
  const reading=items.filter(it=>it.status!=='completed');
  const completed=items.filter(it=>it.status==='completed');
  return(<div className="media-page">
    <div className="media-block">
      <div className="media-block-header">
        <div><div className="media-block-title">Reading List</div><div className="media-block-sub">Books, articles, and podcasts you're following.</div></div>
        <button className="btn primary sm" onClick={onAdd}>+ Add</button>
      </div>
      {reading.length===0&&<div style={{fontSize:'12px',color:'var(--text3)',fontStyle:'italic',padding:'8px 0'}}>Nothing in your reading list yet.</div>}
      <div className="media-list">
        {reading.map(it=><MediaEntry key={it.id} item={it} onEdit={onEdit} onRemove={onRemove} onToggleComplete={onToggleComplete} onUpdateQuotes={onUpdateQuotes}/>)}
      </div>
    </div>
    <CompletedMediaSection items={completed} onViewAll={onViewAll}/>
  </div>);
}

function App(){
  const days=next8();
  const [tasks,setTasks]=useState({});
  const [forward,setForward]=useState([]);
  const [nextWeek,_setNextWeek]=useState([]);
  const nextWeekRef=useRef([]);
  const setNextWeek=val=>{const nv=typeof val==='function'?val(nextWeekRef.current):val;nextWeekRef.current=nv;_setNextWeek(nv);};
  const [sel,setSel]=useState(0);
  const [editing,setEditing]=useState(null);
  const [editFwd,setEditFwd]=useState(null);
  const [editNW,setEditNW]=useState(null);
  const [mobTab,setMobTab]=useState('today');
  const [syncStatus,setSyncStatus]=useState('loading');
  const saveTimer=useRef(null);
  const mainRef=useRef(null);
  const [mediaItems,setMediaItems]=useState(()=>mediaLoad());
  const [showAllCompleted,setShowAllCompleted]=useState(false);
  const [addMediaModal,setAddMediaModal]=useState(false);
  const [editMedia,setEditMedia]=useState(null);

  useEffect(()=>{(async()=>{try{const[t,f,nw]=await Promise.all([dbLoadTasks(),dbLoadForward(),dbLoadNextWeek()]);setTasks(t);setForward(f);setNextWeek(nw);setSyncStatus('ok');}catch(e){console.error(e);setSyncStatus('error');}})();},[]);

  const scheduleSave=(tasksObj,fwdArr)=>{
    if(saveTimer.current)clearTimeout(saveTimer.current);
    setSyncStatus('syncing');
    saveTimer.current=setTimeout(async()=>{try{const ops=[];Object.entries(tasksObj).forEach(([dayKey,ts])=>{ts.forEach((t,i)=>ops.push(dbUpsertTask(t,dayKey,i)));});fwdArr.forEach((t,i)=>ops.push(dbUpsertForward(t,i)));nextWeekRef.current.forEach((t,i)=>ops.push(dbUpsertNextWeek(t,i)));await Promise.all(ops);setSyncStatus('ok');}catch(e){console.error(e);setSyncStatus('error');}},800);
  };

  const addTask=(k,n)=>{const task={id:uid(),name:n,status:'',context:'',complete:false,attachments:[]};setTasks(prev=>{const next={...prev,[k]:[...(prev[k]||[]),task]};scheduleSave(next,forward);return next;});};
  const toggleTask=(k,id)=>setTasks(p=>{const next={...p,[k]:(p[k]||[]).map(t=>t.id===id?{...t,complete:!t.complete}:t)};scheduleSave(next,forward);return next;});
  const saveTask=(k,u)=>setTasks(p=>{const next={...p,[k]:(p[k]||[]).map(t=>t.id===u.id?u:t)};scheduleSave(next,forward);return next;});
  const updTasks=(k,a)=>setTasks(p=>{const next={...p,[k]:a};scheduleSave(next,forward);return next;});
  const delTask=(k,id)=>{dbDeleteTask(id);setTasks(p=>{const next={...p,[k]:(p[k]||[]).filter(t=>t.id!==id)};scheduleSave(next,forward);return next;});setEditing(null);};
  const movTask=(f,t,id)=>setTasks(p=>{const task=(p[f]||[]).find(x=>x.id===id);if(!task)return p;const next={...p,[f]:(p[f]||[]).filter(x=>x.id!==id),[t]:[...(p[t]||[]),task]};scheduleSave(next,forward);return next;});
  const moveToFwd=(fd,id)=>{const task=(tasks[fd]||[]).find(t=>t.id===id);if(!task)return;setTasks(prev=>{const next={...prev,[fd]:(prev[fd]||[]).filter(t=>t.id!==id)};const nf=[...forward,task];scheduleSave(next,nf);setForward(nf);return next;});};
  const addFwd=n=>{const task={id:uid(),name:n,status:'',context:'',complete:false,attachments:[]};setForward(prev=>{const next=[...prev,task];scheduleSave(tasks,next);return next;});};
  const remFwd=id=>{dbDeleteForward(id);setForward(p=>{const next=p.filter(t=>t.id!==id);scheduleSave(tasks,next);return next;});};
  const saveFwd=u=>setForward(p=>{const next=p.map(t=>t.id===u.id?u:t);scheduleSave(tasks,next);return next;});
  const delFwd=id=>{dbDeleteForward(id);setForward(p=>{const next=p.filter(t=>t.id!==id);scheduleSave(tasks,next);return next;});setEditFwd(null);};

  const addMedia=item=>{const next=[...mediaItems,item];setMediaItems(next);mediaSave(next);};
  const updateMedia=item=>{const next=mediaItems.map(m=>m.id===item.id?item:m);setMediaItems(next);mediaSave(next);};
  const removeMedia=id=>{const next=mediaItems.filter(m=>m.id!==id);setMediaItems(next);mediaSave(next);};
  const toggleMediaComplete=id=>{const next=mediaItems.map(m=>m.id===id?{...m,status:m.status==='completed'?'reading':'completed',completedAt:m.status==='completed'?null:Date.now()}:m);setMediaItems(next);mediaSave(next);};
  const updateMediaQuotes=(id,quotes)=>{const next=mediaItems.map(m=>m.id===id?{...m,quotes}:m);setMediaItems(next);mediaSave(next);};

  const selectDay=(i)=>{
    setSel(i);
    setMobTab('today');
    // scroll main back to top
    if(mainRef.current)mainRef.current.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});
  };

  const cur=days[sel],ck=dk(cur),ct=tasks[ck]||[];

  const sidebarDays=days.map((d,i)=>{const k=dk(d),count=(tasks[k]||[]).length,done=(tasks[k]||[]).filter(t=>t.complete).length;return(
    <div key={k} className={'s-day'+(i===0?' today':'')+(sel===i?' active':'')} onClick={()=>selectDay(i)}>
      <div className="s-day-label">{i===0?'Today':DAYS[d.getDay()]}</div>
      <div className="s-day-date">{MS[d.getMonth()]} {d.getDate()}</div>
      {count>0&&<div className="s-day-count">{done}/{count} complete</div>}
    </div>
  );});

  const weekStrip=(<div style={{display:'flex',flexDirection:'column',gap:'10px'}}>
    <div className="strip-label">Coming Up</div>
    <div className="week-row">
      {/* Today card first so you can scroll back */}
      <div className={'week-card'+(sel===0?' is-today':'')} onClick={()=>selectDay(0)}>
        <div className="week-card-header"><div><div className="week-day-name">Today</div><div className="week-day-month">{MS[days[0].getMonth()]}</div></div><div className="week-day-num">{days[0].getDate()}</div></div>
        {(tasks[dk(days[0])]||[]).filter(t=>!t.complete).length===0?<div className="week-empty">{(tasks[dk(days[0])]||[]).length>0?'all done':'clear'}</div>:(tasks[dk(days[0])]||[]).filter(t=>!t.complete).map(t=><div key={t.id} className="week-pill"><span className="week-pill-dot"/>{t.name}</div>)}
      </div>
      {days.slice(1).map((d,i)=>{const k=dk(d),dt=tasks[k]||[];return(
        <div key={k} className={'week-card'+(sel===i+1?' is-today':'')} onClick={()=>selectDay(i+1)}
          onDragOver={e=>{e.preventDefault();e.currentTarget.classList.add('drop-target');}}
          onDragLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.classList.remove('drop-target')}
          onDrop={e=>{e.preventDefault();e.currentTarget.classList.remove('drop-target');const tid=e.dataTransfer.getData('taskId'),fd=e.dataTransfer.getData('fromDay');if(fd&&fd!==k)movTask(fd,k,tid);}}>
          <div className="week-card-header"><div><div className="week-day-name">{DAYS[d.getDay()]}</div><div className="week-day-month">{MS[d.getMonth()]}</div></div><div className="week-day-num">{d.getDate()}</div></div>
          {dt.filter(t=>!t.complete).length===0?<div className="week-empty">{dt.length>0?'all done':'clear'}</div>:dt.filter(t=>!t.complete).map(t=><div key={t.id} className="week-pill"><span className="week-pill-dot"/>{t.name}</div>)}
        </div>
      );})}
    </div>
  </div>);

  return(<div className="app">
    <div className="sidebar">
      <div className="sidebar-logo">TaskBloc</div>
      <div className="sidebar-sub">your days, organized</div>
      <SyncStatus status={syncStatus}/>
      <div className="sidebar-section">This Week</div>
      {sidebarDays}
      {forward.length>0&&<><div className="sidebar-section" style={{color:'var(--purple)'}}>Looking Forward</div><div className="s-day" style={{cursor:'default'}}><div className="s-day-count" style={{color:'var(--purple)',fontSize:'10px'}}>{forward.length} task{forward.length!==1?'s':''} parked</div></div></>}
      <div className="sidebar-section" style={{color:'var(--accent2)'}}>Reading</div>
      <div className={'s-reading-link'+(mobTab==='reading'?' active':'')} onClick={()=>{setMobTab('reading');setShowAllCompleted(false);}}>
        <span>📚</span><span className="s-reading-link-label">Reading List</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div className="main" ref={mainRef}>
      {mobTab==='today'&&<>
        <SyncStatus status={syncStatus}/>
        <DayBlock date={cur} tasks={ct} isToday={sel===0} onAdd={addTask} onToggle={toggleTask} onOpen={t=>setEditing({task:t,dayKey:ck})} onUpdateTasks={updTasks} onMoveTask={movTask}/>
        {weekStrip}
        <LookingForward items={forward} onDrop={moveToFwd} onRemove={remFwd} onOpen={t=>setEditFwd(t)} onAdd={addFwd}/>
      </>}
      {mobTab==='days'&&<><div className="sidebar-section" style={{fontSize:'11px',paddingLeft:0}}>This Week</div><div style={{display:'flex',flexDirection:'column',gap:'8px'}}>{sidebarDays}</div></>}
      {mobTab==='forward'&&<LookingForward items={forward} onDrop={moveToFwd} onRemove={remFwd} onOpen={t=>setEditFwd(t)} onAdd={addFwd}/>}
      {mobTab==='reading'&&(!showAllCompleted
        ?<MediaPage items={mediaItems} onAdd={()=>setAddMediaModal(true)} onEdit={setEditMedia} onRemove={removeMedia} onToggleComplete={toggleMediaComplete} onUpdateQuotes={updateMediaQuotes} onViewAll={()=>setShowAllCompleted(true)}/>
        :<AllCompletedPage items={mediaItems.filter(m=>m.status==='completed')} onBack={()=>setShowAllCompleted(false)}/>
      )}
    </div>

    <nav className="mob-nav">
      <button className={'mob-btn'+(mobTab==='today'?' active':'')} onClick={()=>setMobTab('today')}><span className="mob-icon">📋</span>Today</button>
      <button className={'mob-btn'+(mobTab==='days'?' active':'')} onClick={()=>setMobTab('days')}><span className="mob-icon">📅</span>Days</button>
      <button className={'mob-btn'+(mobTab==='forward'?' active':'')} onClick={()=>setMobTab('forward')}><span className="mob-icon">🔭</span>Forward</button>
      <button className={'mob-btn'+(mobTab==='reading'?' active':'')} onClick={()=>{setMobTab('reading');setShowAllCompleted(false);}}><span className="mob-icon">📚</span>Reading</button>
    </nav>

    {editing&&<TaskModal task={editing.task} onClose={()=>setEditing(null)} onSave={u=>{saveTask(editing.dayKey,u);setEditing(null);}} onDelete={()=>delTask(editing.dayKey,editing.task.id)}/>}
    {editFwd&&<TaskModal task={editFwd} onClose={()=>setEditFwd(null)} onSave={u=>{saveFwd(u);setEditFwd(null);}} onDelete={()=>delFwd(editFwd.id)}/>}
    {(addMediaModal||editMedia)&&<MediaEntryModal entry={editMedia||{}} onClose={()=>{setAddMediaModal(false);setEditMedia(null);}} onSave={item=>{editMedia?updateMedia(item):addMedia(item);setAddMediaModal(false);setEditMedia(null);}} onDelete={editMedia?()=>{removeMedia(editMedia.id);setEditMedia(null);}:undefined}/>}
  </div>);
}

ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')).render(<App/>);

if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
  window.addEventListener('load', () => {
    navigator.serviceWorker.register('/TaskBloc/sw.js')
      .then(r => console.log('SW registered:', r.scope))
      .catch(e => console.log('SW failed:', e));
  });
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
